title: Open Parametric Hand
description: Working on this during my remote internship at CREATE Lab, EPFL. Mostly focusing on 3D design and rapid prototyping to build an open-source robotic hand.

title: Balancing Builder Bot
description: Made a two-wheeled self-balancing robot for the e-Yantra competition where we placed 4th internationally. Handled the embedded firmware and LQR control logic after running simulations.

title: Multichannel Infusion System
description: Developed this hardware setup for an ex vivo heart revival platform during my time at ACT Lab, IIT Madras.

title: Automatic Blood Smear Device
description: Built an automatic blood smear device for sickle cell anaemia screening during my internship at BETIC, IIT Bombay.

title: Posture Pro Belt
description: Led the R&D for a portable posture correction belt prototype for MEDHA 2024. Focused completely on the hardware-software integration.

title: Maze Solver Bot
description: Currently making this for e-Yantra 2025-26 stage 2. Writing the embedded firmware and control logic to navigate the maze.
